children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: It shall be unlawful for any person, other than an athlete, to knowingly carry into effect, attempt to carry into effect, or conspire with any other person to carry into effect a scheme in commerce to influence by use of a prohibited substance or prohibited method any major international sports competition.

children.heading: Extraterritorial jurisdiction
children.label: b Extraterritorial jurisdiction
children.text: There is extraterritorial Federal jurisdiction over an offense under this section.
